note: Per-year State Budget Law (ЗДБРБ): when it was adopted/promulgated (Държавен вестник) and the dates of any in-year amendments (актуализация / ЗИД на ЗДБ). Used to mark WHO defended a year's budget (the finance minister in office at adoption) vs who executed it — they often differ, since the budget for year Y is normally adopted in late Y-1. 'adopted' null = no State Budget Law was in force (caretaker year on an extended/bridging law). Author/reviser names are resolved at display time from data/finance_ministers.json by date, so this file carries only dates. Routine pre-2020 laws use the conventional late-December (Y-1) promulgation; exact dates are used for delayed adoptions and the verified amendments. Sources: dv.parliament.bg / minfin.bg; 2020-2025 dates cross-checked against scripts/budget/fetch_sources.ts. 2005 omitted (its budget was adopted Dec 2004 under a finance minister outside the covered range).
